events.event_title: PBSO Books Epstein for Photo Lineup at Sheriff's Office
events.description: Jeffrey Epstein was booked at Palm Beach Sheriff's Office for photo lineup with booking ID 20060723017, recorded as 53 years old, 6 feet tall, 180 lbs with gray hair and hazel eyes
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein was physically present at the Sheriff's Office for booking and photo lineup procedures.
